label: 🦖 Urzeit-Dschungel
prompt: The people from @image1 in a prehistoric jungle near a dinosaur — for a man: explorer shirt & cargo pants; for a woman: practical adventurer shorts & jacket. Lush prehistoric jungle with ancient flora.

label: 🚀 Galaktische Odyssee
prompt: The people from @image1 in outer space — floating near a glowing nebula or inside a spaceship cockpit — for a man: NASA-style spacesuit or sci-fi captain's uniform; for a woman: sleek sci-fi bodysuit or female astronaut suit. Stars and colorful nebulae in the background.

label: 🤠 Wilder Westen
prompt: The people from @image1 in an American Wild West setting — inside a saloon or on a dusty main street — for a man: cowboy duster coat or sheriff's uniform; for a woman: cowgirl riding outfit or frontier saloon dress. Warm golden western atmosphere.

label: ⚔️ Ritter & Burgen
prompt: The people from @image1 in a medieval setting — on a castle wall or in a great hall — for a man: knight armor or nobleman's tournament tunic; for a woman: elegant noblewoman's gown or lady knight armor. Stone walls and torchlight in the background.

label: 🎨 Pop-Art Comic
prompt: All the people from @image1 as a comic book illustration — pop-art style with bold ink outlines, vibrant halftone dot shading, saturated colors and retro explosive text shapes.

label: 🪩 80er-Jahre Retro
prompt: The people from @image1 at a 1980s neon party — dancing under a disco ball or roller-skating — for a man: neon windbreaker & retro jeans; for a woman: leg warmers & off-shoulder neon top. Colorful retro party atmosphere.

label: 🕶️ Cyberpunk 2077
prompt: The people from @image1 in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night — on a rain-slicked street or in a neon-lit bar — for a man: cybernetic jacket with glowing LED lines; for a woman: cyber bodysuit with LED accents. Neon signs and rain-reflected lights.

label: 🏝️ Piraten-Abenteuer
prompt: The people from @image1 as pirates — on the deck of a galleon or on a tropical beach with treasure — for a man: captain's coat & tricorn hat; for a woman: swashbuckling pirate dress. Blue ocean and tropical setting.

label: 🔱 Unterwasser-Atlantis
prompt: The people from @image1 exploring underwater Atlantis — among ancient stone columns and colorful coral reefs — for a man: Atlantean warrior armor; for a woman: mermaid queen gown with flowing fins. Soft blue underwater light with floating bubbles.

label: 🧛 Vampir-Schloss
prompt: The people from @image1 as elegant vampires in a gothic castle — on a grand staircase or by a moonlit window — for a man: velvet cape & gothic coat; for a woman: gothic ball gown. Candlelit gothic interior.

label: 🕵️‍♂️ Film Noir Detektiv
prompt: The people from @image1 in a 1940s film noir scene — under a streetlamp or in a detective's office — for a man: trench coat & fedora; for a woman: 1940s detective dress or femme fatale evening gown. Black and white photography.

label: 🧟 Zombie-Apokalypse
prompt: The people from @image1 in a post-apocalyptic setting — in an abandoned building or on a ruined city street — for a man: tactical military gear; for a woman: practical survivor jacket & pants. Gritty desaturated atmosphere.

label: 👑 Hollywood Roter Teppich
prompt: The people from @image1 at a Hollywood movie premiere — walking the red carpet or holding a golden award trophy — for a man: sharp tuxedo; for a woman: stunning evening gown. Bright flashbulbs and glamorous red carpet.

label: 🏎️ Formel 1 Rennfahrer
prompt: The people from @image1 as professional racing drivers — holding a helmet next to a supercar or celebrating on a podium with champagne, wearing a racing jumpsuit with sponsor patches. Colorful racetrack environment.

label: 🧙‍♂️ Zauberer-Akademie
prompt: The people from @image1 as wizards — casting a glowing spell with a wand or in a grand library with flying candles — for a man: dark wizard robes or sorcerer's ceremonial robe; for a woman: witch's flowing robes or sorceress gown. Warm magical candlelight with floating sparks.

label: 🏖️ 1950s Vintage Strand
prompt: The people from @image1 on a sunny 1950s California beach — holding a vintage surfboard or next to a classic retro camper van — for a man: swim trunks & Hawaiian shirt; for a woman: one-piece swimsuit or retro bikini. Warm sunshine and vintage Polaroid color mood.

label: 🏯 Samurai-Legende
prompt: The people from @image1 in historical Japan — in a zen garden with cherry blossoms or in front of a traditional pagoda — for a man: samurai armor or ronin's hakama; for a woman: flowing furisode kimono or onna-musha warrior armor. Soft mist and cherry blossom petals.

label: 🧸 3D Pixar Animation
prompt: All the people from @image1 as 3D animated Pixar-style characters — interacting with a cute talking animal or exploring a whimsical fantasy village. Vibrant saturated colors, soft clay-like lighting.

label: 🎸 Rock-Star Arena
prompt: The people from @image1 as rock stars on stage — singing into a microphone or playing electric guitar — for a man: leather jacket & ripped jeans; for a woman: rock diva stage dress or leather jacket & fishnet outfit. Colorful stage lighting and fog.

label: 🧸 Steampunk-Tüftler
prompt: The people from @image1 as Victorian steampunk inventors — operating a brass clockwork machine or holding a copper gadget — for a man: inventor's coat with brass gear wheels; for a woman: steampunk corset dress with brass accessories. Warm industrial copper atmosphere with drifting smoke.
